title: funastrum palmeri
intro: Funastrum palmeri, also known as Palmer's funastrum or Mexican snuff box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. Funastrum palmeri has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as to reduce pain and inflammation.
